title: selaginella helicoclada
intro: Selaginella helicoclada, also known as the 'twisted spikemoss', is a type of evergreen, perennial plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella helicoclada include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve respiratory health, and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
